calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Default Judgment And For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Vercai, Inc., a California corporation, Adam C. Leining, an individual, and Vercai Solutions, LLC, a California limited liability company.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Christian J. Martinez, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Svitla Systems, a California corporation.
Nataliya Anon, Chief Executive Officer for plaintiff Svitla Systems, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Vercai, Inc., a California corporation, Adam C. Leining, an individual, or Vercai Solutions, LLC, a California limited liability company
Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract was filed on October 2, 2017 and served on defendants as follows:

(1) Defendant Vercai, Inc. - October 3, 2017;
(2) Defendant Adam Leining - October 10, 2017; and
(3) Defendant Vercai Solutions - March 5, 2018.

Defaults were entered against defendants Vercai, Inc., a California corporation, Adam C. Leining, an individual, and Vercai Solutions, LLC, a California limited liability company, on May 2, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 1, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Svitla Systems, Inc., a California corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants Vercai, Inc., a California corporation, Adam C. Leining, an individual, and Vercai Solutions, LLC, a California limited liability company, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $50,225.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,359.21.
Attorney Fees - $5,600.00.
Costs - $450.00.

Total - $62,634.21.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2018 Continued To Dec-04-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Default Judgment And For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-10-2018 Continued To Oct-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
